Variables.Name: NavLocalGridManagerClassName
Variables.Description: Class that will be used to spawn the hot spot manager, can be game-specific

Variables.Name: AcceptanceRadius
Variables.Description:
Default AI movement's acceptance radius used to determine whether 
 	  AI reached path's end

Variables.Name: PathfollowingRegularPathPointAcceptanceRadius
Variables.Description:
Value used for pathfollowing's internal code to determine whether AI reached path's point. 
	 	@note this value is not used for path's last point. @see AcceptanceRadius

Variables.Name: PathfollowingNavLinkAcceptanceRadius
Variables.Description:
Similarly to PathfollowingRegularPathPointAcceptanceRadius used by pathfollowing's internals
	 	but gets applied only when next point on a path represents a begining of navigation link

Variables.Name: bEnableBTAITasks
Variables.Description: this property is just a transition-time flag - in the end we're going to switch over to Gameplay Tasks anyway, that's the goal.

Variables.Name: bAllowControllersAsEQSQuerier
Variables.Description:
if enable will make EQS not complaint about using Controllers as queriers. Default behavior (false) will 
	 	in places automatically convert controllers to pawns, and complain if code user bypasses the conversion or uses
	 	pawn-less controller

Variables.Name: bEnableDebuggerPlugin
Variables.Description: if set, GameplayDebuggerPlugin will be loaded on module's startup

Variables.Name: BehaviorTreeManager
Variables.Description: Behavior tree manager used by game

Variables.Name: EnvironmentQueryManager
Variables.Description: Environment query manager used by game
